_meta.description: Editable Orange County 3-bedroom rental benchmarks for deal scoring. Values are conservative research estimates, not guaranteed statistical medians.
_meta.important_warning: Rental markets change frequently. Benchmarks should be reviewed before making rental decisions.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com city rent trend pages
data_sources.notes: Fallback synthesized from the 15 researched Orange County city 3BR rent trend values.

data_sources.name: HUD USER Fair Market Rents
data_sources.notes: County/metropolitan FMR context; not a private-market listing median.

data_sources.name: fmr.fyi Santa Ana FY2026 SAFMR view
data_sources.notes: Provides FY2026 HUD SAFMR context and market-alignment ranges for one Orange County city.

Orange County.notes: County fallback only. Prefer a city benchmark when available.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Irvine rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $4,386 and average size of 1,309 sqft.

Irvine.notes: Apartment benchmark proxy; single-family homes with yards and garages can run higher.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Costa Mesa rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,359 and average size of 1,152 sqft.

Costa Mesa.notes: Wide spread between apartment and beach-adjacent house rents; verify detached listings manually.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Huntington Beach rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $4,131 and average size of 1,287 sqft.

Huntington Beach.notes: Beach proximity creates large variance; stronger listings near the coast may exceed the typical high range.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Newport Beach rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $5,700 and average size of 1,440 sqft.

Newport Beach.notes: Luxury and coastal inventory creates very high variance; treat below-market signals as review triggers.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Orange rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,700 and average size of 1,312 sqft.

Orange.notes: Good comparison point for central OC; verify neighborhood and school-area premiums.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Anaheim rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $2,988 and average size of 1,125 sqft.

Anaheim.notes: Anaheim Hills and newer inventory can price well above city average.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Tustin rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,598 and average size of 1,293 sqft.

Tustin.notes: Tustin Ranch and newer townhome inventory can sit above this apartment-derived baseline.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Fullerton rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,572 and average size of 1,235 sqft.

Fullerton.notes: Single-family homes near premium school zones may be above this apartment-oriented benchmark.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Mission Viejo rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,924 and average size of 1,253 sqft.

Mission Viejo.notes: Benchmark confidence is low because target listings are often houses/townhomes rather than apartment units.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Lake Forest rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,970 and average size of 1,331 sqft.

Lake Forest.notes: Lower confidence because the city has fewer comparable apartment rentals and many family rentals are houses.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Garden Grove rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $2,703 and average size of 1,047 sqft.

Garden Grove.notes: Apartment baseline may understate detached-home asking rents.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Santa Ana rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,248 and average size of 1,229 sqft.

data_sources.name: fmr.fyi Santa Ana FY2026 SAFMR view
data_sources.notes: Shows HUD FY2026 3BR SAFMR and market-rent ranges by ZIP; used as a cross-check, not the primary benchmark.

Santa Ana.notes: Central OC apartment benchmark; confirm neighborhood and parking details carefully.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Aliso Viejo rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $4,472 and average size of 1,754 sqft.

Aliso Viejo.notes: Lower confidence because 3BR inventory appears limited and unit sizes skew larger.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Laguna Niguel rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,878 and average size of 1,295 sqft.

Laguna Niguel.notes: Lower confidence because family rentals can be townhomes or houses with different yard/garage premiums.

data_sources.name: Apartments.com Yorba Linda rent trends
data_sources.notes: May 2026 page reports 3BR apartment average rent of $3,933 and average size of 1,450 sqft.

Yorba Linda.notes: Lower confidence because the target is likely detached-family inventory rather than apartments.
